item.title: Version 1.0.3
item.description:
### Added - First-launch onboarding now surfaces the microphone and accessibility permission prompts automatically. Previously, because Setup Agent lives only in the menu bar, a fresh install opened no window and you had to find Settings yourself before it could start listening. - The installer disk image now opens a styled drag-to-Applications window, so installing is a single drag.
### Changed - Wake-word models are now stored in an app-managed location. Models saved by an earlier version are migrated automatically the first time you launch this build — no action needed.
### Fixed - After updating, macOS may ask you to re-grant Microphone, Accessibility, and Automation permissions once. This is expected: the app now uses a stable new identity, and the new onboarding will walk you through granting them.

item.title: Version 1.0.2
item.description: ### Fixed - The app now launches reliably from the packaged build. SwiftPM resource bundles are resolved from the app's `Contents/Resources`, fixing a startup failure where the previous build could fail to load its bundled resources.

item.title: Version 1.0.1
item.description: ### Changed - First release published to the public **SetupAgent** distribution repo (signed, notarized DMG + Sparkle auto-update). Source stays in the private source repo.
